name: Wireless Ergonomic Mouse
description: A comfortable wireless mouse with adjustable DPI and ergonomic design.

name: Mechanical Keyboard
description: RGB mechanical keyboard with tactile blue switches.

name: Noise Cancelling Headphones
description: Over-ear headphones with active noise cancellation and 30-hour battery life.

name: USB-C Hub
description: 7-in-1 USB-C hub with HDMI, SD card reader, and 100W power delivery.

name: 27-inch 4K Monitor
description: IPS panel 4K monitor with ultra-thin bezels and color accuracy.

name: Adjustable Laptop Stand
description: Aluminum alloy laptop stand, adjustable height and angle.

name: Webcam 1080p
description: HD webcam with built-in microphone and privacy cover.

name: Desk Pad
description: Large PU leather desk pad, waterproof and easy to clean.

name: Wireless Charging Pad
description: Fast 15W wireless charger compatible with Qi-enabled devices.

name: External SSD 1TB
description: Portable NVMe SSD with speeds up to 1050MB/s.

name: Cable Management Kit
description: Includes cable sleeves, clips, and ties to organize your desk.
